---
name: 🚀 Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or new interface support for VNIM.
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. E.g. "I'm always frustrated when I want to configure WireGuard interfaces, but VNIM doesn't support them..."

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. Explain how the YAML properties or CLI commands should look.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

**Additional context**
Add any other context, designs, or mockups about the feature request here.
